title: Pan-Africanism and the OAU
description: Quiz on Pan-Africanism, the formation of the OAU, its organs, and its successor the African Union.

questions.question: What is the central idea of Pan-Africanism?
options: Peoples of African descent have common interests and should be unified
All African countries should have the same government
questions.correctAnswer: Peoples of African descent have common interests and should be unified

questions.question: Where was the Fifth Pan-African Congress held in October 1945?
Which organisation did Kwame Nkrumah help form in 1958 with Guinea?
options: The Union of Independent African States
questions.correctAnswer: The Union of Independent African States

questions.question: The Casablanca Group favoured what kind of political union for Africa?
options: A strong political union like the United States of Africa
questions.correctAnswer: A strong political union like the United States of Africa

questions.question: Which countries played a neutral bridging role between the Casablanca and Monrovia groups?
In which city was the OAU established in May 1963?
How many African nations established the OAU in 1963?
Which was NOT one of the principal organs of the OAU?
options: Assembly of Heads of State and Government

questions.question: What was the greatest success of the OAU?
Where and when was the African Union (AU) officially launched?
